name: Hearty Vegetarian Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 large green bell pepper, seeded, chopped
5 cups kidney beans, cooked, with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large 5 - 6 quart pot or kettle, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onions and green bell pepper; stir occasionally until the onions are golden brown and the peppers are soft.
3. Stir in the mustard seeds and cook for one minute, stirring as it cooks.
4. Add the chili powder, cumin, cocoa, and cinnamon. Cook for an additional 30 seconds to release the flavors.
5. Mix in the chopped tomatoes (with their liquid), kidney beans (with their liquid), carrots, mushrooms, and tomato paste.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, uncovered, stirring frequently, until most of the liquid has cooked away and the chili thickens, about 40 minutes.
7. Note: If using canned kidney beans, you may substitute with 3 cups of drained beans plus 1 cup water.
